preamble: The raising of a mid-front nasalized vowel [ẽ] to a high-front nasalized vowel [ĩ] is a well-documented process in several languages, particularly where nasalization promotes vowel raising.
sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
